items.title: Ademi & Fruchter LLP Continues to Investigate Claims of Securities Fraud against UnitedHealth Group Incorporated
items.description: Ademi & Fruchter LLP is investigating possible securities fraud claims against UnitedHealth . The investigation results from inaccurate statements UnitedHealth made regarding its business operations...

items.title: Boomerang CEOs Know ‘Where Everything’s Buried.’ So Why Are Second Acts So Hard?
items.description: Boomerang CEOs Know ‘Where Everything’s Buried.’ So Why Are Second Acts So Hard?

items.title: UnitedHealth Places New Bet on Old CEO Who Made It a Giant
items.description: As CEO for more than a decade,  Stephen Hemsley  built up  UnitedHealth Group  now a $400 billion healthcare behemoth.  With his return to the top job, the company will learn whether his playbook still works.  Hemsley, 72, is back in the chief executive’s chair after seven years as chairman, and UnitedHealth is in a more vulnerable position than it has been since he started his first CEO stint in 2006, in the shadow of a stock-options-backdating scandal that helped lead to the ouster of his predecessor.

items.title: Stocks to Watch Tuesday: Coinbase, Boeing, Hertz, UnitedHealth
items.description: ↗️ Coinbase (COIN): Shares surged 25% after S&P Dow Jones Indices said the crypto exchange will join the S&P 500 on May 19. ↗️ Boeing (BA): The aviation company's shares rose 2.7% after China scrapped a ban on airlines taking delivery of Boeing planes.
